name: Owen R.
title: Best fade in South Kensington
body: Elliott took his time and the finish lasts three weeks. Worth every pound. Already booked the next one.

name: Bryan F.
title: Hot towel shave is the move
body: 45 minutes of pure relaxation. Walked out feeling like a new person. Will be back every time I'm in London.

name: Cole M.
title: Sharp work, no hype
body: No flash, no nonsense, just clean cuts and a good consultation. The kind of barbershop I grew up with.

name: Stefan W.
title: Beard work is unreal
body: Reuben sculpted my beard in a way I couldn't get anywhere else. The hot oil finish makes a real difference through a London winter.

name: Cole R.
title: Online booking just works
body: Booked in 30 seconds. Got a text confirmation, another 8 hours before. Showed up, sat down, walked out fresh.

name: Jordan B.
title: Wedding party perfection
body: Six groomsmen, two hours, two barbers came to our hotel suite in Kensington. Worth every penny, the photos look incredible.

name: Aiden M.
title: First time and it was excellent
body: Walked in for a Signature Cut. Quick consultation, clean execution, hot-towel finish. Already rebooked.

name: Carlos W.
title: Solid spot, busy on weekends
body: Quality is great but Friday after 5pm is packed. Book ahead. Cal is excellent with textured hair.

name: Mason W.
title: Cal is patient with my kid
body: My son hates haircuts. Cal kept him calm with LEGO and finished a clean cut in under 30 minutes. Annual hero.

name: Hassan S.
title: Best £88 I spent in London
body: The Cranley: cut, beard, scalp massage, hot-towel shave. Skipped the matinee, did this instead. No regrets.

name: Bryan S.
title: Skin fade that held up all month
body: Three weeks later still looks fresh. The aftercare advice from Elliott actually works.

name: Hassan B.
title: Great cut, parking is tight
body: Street parking around the mews fills up fast. Get there 10 minutes early or take the Tube. Cut itself? Perfect.

name: Cole O.
title: Pomade is the best I've used
body: Bought a jar after my cut. Holds all day, washes out clean. Already on my second jar.

name: Zach B.
title: The Cranley was unreal
body: Booked the full package on my last night in London. Easily worth it. Looks better than anything else on my camera roll from the trip.

name: Marco M.
title: Regular for 3 years now
body: Oakline has been my shop since they opened. Quality has only gotten better. Elliott and the team take real pride in the work.

name: Trent B.
title: Cal handled my curls
body: Most barbers thin out my hair instead of shaping it. Cal actually knows textured cuts. Found my London spot.
